title: Calendar
description: Calendar renders an interactive calendar for selecting a single date. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max date constraints, disabled dates, and multiple calendar modes (days, months, quarters, years).

title: DateField
description: DateField is a text input for entering a date and/or time value following a specified format. Each date segment (year, month, day, hour, minute, second) is independently editable.

title: DatePicker
description: DatePicker combines a DateField input with a Calendar popup for selecting a single date. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max constraints, disabled dates, and various sizes.

title: RangeCalendar
description: RangeCalendar renders an interactive calendar for selecting a date range (start and end dates). Extends Calendar with range selection support including hover highlighting.

title: RelativeDateField
description: RelativeDateField is an input for entering relative date expressions (e.g., 'now-7d') or absolute dates. Parses relative syntax and resolves to actual DateTime values.

title: RelativeDatePicker
description: RelativeDatePicker combines a RelativeDateField input with a Calendar popup. Allows selecting both absolute dates via calendar and entering relative date expressions.
